zh.lifeSummary: 當Philippa Normandie於大約1037年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲時，她的父親EDWARD Ewrus22歲，母親MRS Edward of Salisbury18歲。她於1055年與Walter d'Evreux在法國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1066年在英國英格蘭賀福爾享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philippa Normandie于大约1037年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲时，她的父亲EDWARD Ewrus22岁，母亲MRS Edward of Salisbury18岁。她于1055年与Walter d'Evreux在法国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1066年在英国英格兰賀福爾享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Normandie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Alain, Serge, Adrien, Andre, Aurore, Celine, Clovis, Emile, Gaetan, Gilles, Laurier.
French: from a diminutive of   Normand  . Compare   Normandy  .

variants.name: Normand
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gaston, Andre, Laurent, Marcel, Pierre, Amie, Donat, Emile, Herve, Jacques, Jean Noel, Jean-Michel.
French and Breton (mainly Finistère; also Le Normand): habitational name for someone from Normandy, a region in northern France (see Norman ). Compare Lenormand .

variants.name: Normandy
meanings: English: habitational name from Normandy in northern France. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Philippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Philippa Normandie was born about 1037, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, her father, EDWARD Ewrus, was 22 and her mother, MRS Edward of Salisbury, was 18. She married Walter d'Evreux in 1055, in France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1066, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philippa Normandie est née environ 1037, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, son père, EDWARD Ewrus, avait 22 ans et sa mère, MRS Edward of Salisbury, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Walter d'Evreux en 1055, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1066, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philippa Normandie um 1037 in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater EDWARD Ewrus 22 und ihre Mutter MRS Edward of Salisbury 18. Sie hat 1055 in Frankreich Walter d'Evreux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1066 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa Normandie è nata il circa 1037 nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, sua padre, EDWARD Ewrus, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, MRS Edward of Salisbury, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Walter d'Evreux nel 1055, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1066, nel Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Philippa Normandieが約1037年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで生まれた時，父EDWARD Ewrusは22歳，母MRS Edward of Salisburyは18歳であった。1055年にフランスでWalter d'Evreuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1066年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philippa Normandie(이)가 대략 1037년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 EDWARD Ewrus(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 MRS Edward of Salisbury(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1055년 프랑스에서 Walter d'Evreux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1066년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa Normandie nasceu aproximadamente 1037, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, EDWARD Ewrus, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, MRS Edward of Salisbury, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter d'Evreux em 1055, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1066, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philippa Normandie родилась около 1037 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени EDWARD Ewrus было 22 года, а матери, которую звали MRS Edward of Salisbury, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter d'Evreux в 1055 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1066 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philippa Normandie nació aproximadamente 1037, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, EDWARD Ewrus, tenía 22 años y su mamá, MRS Edward of Salisbury, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Walter d'Evreux en 1055, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1066, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 30 años.
